meta.title: Gl!tch — Roblox Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of a passionate Roblox developer with 7+ years of experience building immersive games and experiences.

intro.name: Gl!tch
intro.bio: Hello! Here you'll find almost everything I've done in the past years as a scripter, if you don't find anything related to what you need, don't worry, I'm capable of scripting mostly everything, please scroll down to find videos or game links about it. Once you are done looking at my portfolio feel free to DM me and tell me the details about your commission. I'll await for your DM!

games.sectionSubtitle: A collection of games I've developed or helped develop on Roblox.

items.title: Refinery Caves 2
items.description: Feb 2025 - Aug 2025. Programmer. A game based on Lumber Tycoon 2, helped in tasks such as heavy optimization, scripting of core systems, bug fixing, aesthetics, terrain generation and more.

items.title: Fine'ry verse
items.description: Aug 2025 - Nov 2025. Lead Programmer. An advert game for the Fine'ry fragrance brand.

items.title: Neuro Malfunction
items.description: Jun 2024 - Jul 2024. Lead Programmer. A game focused on a FPS singleplayer experience where the player has to slow down time in order to escape.

items.title: Dead Descent
items.description: Oct 2022 - Oct 2022. Lead Programmer. Horror game focused on exploration and puzzle solving, with procedurally generated maps and custom AI behaviour.

videos.sectionSubtitle: Videos showcasing my development process, tech demos or any related content.

items.title: Ocean Shader Demo
items.description: Using animated PBR Textures and gestner waves to create a realistic ocean

items.title: FPS System
items.description: A showcase of the custom FPS system I developed, featuring smooth controls, time control, weapon mechanics and AI interactions

items.title: Tower Defense System
items.description: Showcase of a custom Tower Defense system I developed, mainly focused on network optimization, pathfinding and modularity

items.title: 2D Game
items.description: Showcase of a custom 2D game I developed, featuring 2D physics, collisions and water (works with multiplayer too)

items.title: Ray marching demo
items.description: Showcase of a custom ray marching demo I developed, featuring real-time lighting and reflections.

items.title: 2D Game editor
items.description: World builder for the 2D game.

items.title: AI Pathfinding System
items.description: Showcase of a custom AI pathfinding system I developed, capable of handling the AI of +2000 enemies.

items.title: Voxel Factory Game
items.description: Showcase of a prototype of a voxel-based factory like game, mainly focused on machinery, automation, and resource management. Similar to modded Minecraft, I am hoping to finish it one day.

items.title: Soft body physics
items.description: Module that turns any mesh with bones into a mesh with soft body physics including fully custom settings.

items.title: Train movement
items.description: Showcase of a vehicle system that moves along a spline, mainly focused on smooth movement and optimizing network.

items.title: Tile movement
items.description: Showcase of a tile-based movement system, based off Bloxorz.

items.title: Livestreaming script
items.description: Showcase of a livestreaming script I developed, allowing real-time broadcasting to roblox servers.

items.title: Video player
items.description: Showcase of a video player script I developed, allowing real-time video playback within Roblox. (This was made before the video player was added to Roblox womp womp!)

items.title: Quest system
items.description: Quest system focused on modularity, allows you to create and manage quests with different objectives, rewards and conditions.

items.title: Find Luigi minigame
items.description: Just a minigame based of the Find Luigi meme.

items.title: Animation menu
items.description: Menu display that handles loading and playing animations for multiple characters, mostly for cutscenes. (Made for commission)

items.title: Dungeon generator
items.description: Procedural dungeon generator featuring weights, treasure rooms, boss rooms and so on.

items.title: Volumetric smoke
items.description: Showcase of a smoke spread system using voxels, allows for realistic smoke movement and interactions.

items.title: Moore neighbourhood
items.description: Showcase of a Moore neighbourhood implementation, showing how cells interact with their surrounding cells. Just a visual thing not really useful for anything

items.title: Guns replica
items.description: Replica of a guns system for another game

items.title: 3D mesh rendering
items.description: Showcase of a 3D mesh rendering system, can handle around 1000 triangles with decent performance.

items.title: Meshed snow
items.description: Showcase of snow that deforms when you walk on it.

items.title: Cannon script
items.description: Showcase of a simple cannon and score script.

items.title: Laser reflection
items.description: Showcase of a laser reflection system, demonstrating how lasers can bounce off surfaces and interact with objects.

items.title: [OLD] Inverse gravity
items.description: Just a tech demo that inverts gravity for the player, allowing them to walk on the ceiling.

items.title: [OLD] Old 2D Game
items.description: Older version of the 2D game, featuring more basic mechanics and graphics.

items.title: Dynamic water texture
items.description: Tech demo of a basic dynamic water ripple just to test editable images and parallel processing.

snippets.sectionSubtitle: Luau code samples used in some of my projects, feel free to take a look.

items.title: State Manager
items.description: A state manager module I developed to handle game and table states, basically adds a .Changed event to tables, letting you handle changes before and after they are made.

items.title: Spline Creator
items.description: A module for creating and managing splines, allowing for smooth interpolation between points.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Got questions? Here are some answers to the most common ones.

items.question: Are you available for commissions or hire?
items.answer: Yes! I'm open to commissions and contract work. Whether you need a full game built from scratch, specific systems programmed feel free to reach out through my social links above.

items.question: Can I use your open-source modules in my games?
items.answer: Absolutely! Any modules or resources I've published as open-source are free to use in your projects. Just make sure to check the specific license for each resource and give credit where required.

items.question: How can I contact you?
items.answer: The best way to reach me is through Discord. You can find the links in the introduction section at the top of this page.
